logEntries.text: Tovin the majordomo has asked you to recover a stolen set of royal silverware. The trail leads from the kitchen to the storage room downstairs.
You found the silverware tucked behind a sack of flour in the basement storage room.
You returned the silver set to Tovin. The queen's table will be properly laid tonight.
Captain Roderic asked you to make the rounds of all four corner-tower lookouts and report back.
You spoke with one of the four lookouts.
You spoke with two of the four lookouts.
You spoke with three of the four lookouts. One more to go.
All four lookouts reported. Time to find the captain.
Captain Roderic accepted your report. You are welcome at any guard post in the castle.
Warden Ulrec asked you to find a sealed letter said to be in the castle library that would clear an accused prisoner.
You found the sealed letter among the librarian's papers.
You returned the letter to the warden. The prisoner will be freed by morning.
